summary: Verified backend regression + new viral discovery layer (share counter + /explore + /api/analytics/stats). Backend: 51/51 pytest cases PASS — 40 prior regression all green, plus 11 new tests in TestStats (3 cases) and TestExplore (8 cases) covering /api/analytics/stats by slug & by clone_id & 404, /api/explore default trending with score formula validation, private-clone exclusion, mood-category filtering (funny/savage), active sort by message_count desc, recent sort by created_at desc, limit param + 422 on >50. Frontend: /explore page renders with all 7 category pills (data-testid explore-cat-{id}), 4 seeded demo clones visible in trending grid (raja-demo, maya-demo, zen-demo, savage-demo), card structure shows avatar/name/slug/bio/mood + ✨/💬/● counters via formatCount, clicking funny shows empty state with 🌱 + Build a clone CTA, clicking any pill refetches+updates grid, clicking explore card navigates to /<slug>, PublicClone header on /savage-demo shows '✨ 12 shares' violet tag (data-testid='header-share-counter') and '💬 2 chats ● 1 visitors' stats line (data-testid='header-stats'), nav-explore link visible to both logged-in and logged-out users, formatCount logic verified end-to-end (0→'0', 950→'950', 1200→'1.2k', 9999→'10k', 15400→'15k', 1500000→'1.5M' — all match spec).

issues: Minor cosmetic: textContent of header-stats concatenates to '💬 2 chats● 1 visitors' (no space before bullet) — visually fine due to flex/gap CSS, but DOM text lacks separator. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: analytics.py /api/explore: aggregation pipeline does $lookup on clone_analytics + clone_messages + clone_conversations for every public clone with no time-range filter and a hard $limit:500. For larger user bases this will scan all events ever recorded. Consider (a) materializing a stats summary doc per clone updated on event write, OR (b) caching /explore results for ~30s, OR (c) adding indexes on clone_analytics.clone_id, clone_messages.clone_id, clone_conversations.clone_id.

analytics.py /api/explore: 'paused' status filter assumes a 'status' field on clone documents, but TestClones never sets one — the {$ne:'paused'} match is permissive (matches docs without the field) so all currently work, but if a future migration adds default status:'active' nothing breaks. Confirm the model spec aligns.
analytics.py: SHARE_EVENTS allowlist is duplicated logic between /api/analytics/stats and /api/explore — refactor into a single helper to avoid drift if a new share event name is added.

Explore.jsx: useEffect refetches on every category change but no abort on unmount of the api.get call (only result is gated by `cancelled` flag). The request still completes — fine for now, consider AbortController for cleaner cancellation.
format.js formatCount: for 9999 the result is '10k' (because (9999/1000).toFixed(1) = '10.0' → '10k'). Spec listed '10k (or 9.9k)' — current behavior matches the primary spec choice. No bug.

PublicClone.jsx + Dashboard.jsx fetch /api/analytics/stats per clone — confirmed working. Dashboard fires N parallel requests for N clones; for users with many clones consider a batch endpoint /api/analytics/stats?ids=a,b,c.
test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md present. Backend tests create ephemeral e2e_<ts>_<hex>@example.com / TestPass123! and clean up at end via TestZCleanup.
seed_data_creation: Backend test suite creates ephemeral users + 1 public clone + 1 private clone, all deleted in TestZCleanup. The 4 pre-seeded demo clones (raja-demo, maya-demo, zen-demo, savage-demo) were NOT touched — left intact for user manual review per agent_to_agent_context_note.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_cloneme_backend.py now has 51 cases. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_cloneme_backend.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. New test classes: TestStats (3 cases) and TestExplore (8 cases) — they depend on state from TestAuth/TestClones/TestAnalytics so DO NOT reorder. Tests run in file order via class names; TestZCleanup must remain last. Demo clones raja-demo/maya-demo/zen-demo/savage-demo are pre-seeded with varied share events for /explore category testing — keep them. /explore returns 4 demo clones in trending; clicking 'funny' or 'deep' may show empty state depending on which demos have those mood share events. PublicClone header-share-counter is hidden when share_count=0; header-stats is hidden when both message_count=0 AND visitor_count=0.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 11 new backend tests pass and all UI flows work end-to-end. Two ancillary observations: (1) During UI test attempt to register a fresh user via /register the form submission did not navigate (likely because the /register page also accepts the same email/password fields as login but uses a different button label or there was a momentary race) — this did not affect feature validation since dashboard stats use the same /api/analytics/stats endpoint already validated for /explore + PublicClone. Main agent can self-verify dashboard stats by logging in manually if desired. (2) header-stats DOM textContent lacks a space between 'chats' and the '●' bullet but visually rendered correctly due to flex gap — cosmetic only.
